gigapan.description: Sadly it looks like this multi-image portraiture has the effect of throwing us back into the days of long exposure portraits, where people appeared to frown because that was the only expression they felt that they could maintain for the length of the full exposure.  But other than their expressions, this is a great picture of Paige and Anselm :-)
